system.description:
Favoured by Deathwatch sharpshooters, these hooded cloaks are composed of a mesh backing woven with thousands of ribbons of colour shifting and light-absorbing material.

A sharpshooter wearing a camo-cloak gains a +20 bonus to all Concealment Tests. When stationary, the wearer counts as being one range bracket farther away when targeted by ranged weapons.
